name: @claralight-design/symbol-kit-core
description: Platform-agnostic symbol IR, rendering primitives, and weight definitions for ClaraLight Design.
author: AstralSight Studios

scripts.prepack: node ../../node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -b ../compiler --force && node ../../scripts/generate-symbol-catalog.mjs && node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.rmSync('.tsbuildinfo', { force: true })" && node ../../node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -b tsconfig.publish.json --force
